'''Ab'el Bogen''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
From as early as [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] and as late as [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Bogen represented [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. As of 25 ABY, he was a member of the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]]. He was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with stylish blonde hair.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
